parameters.content:
## Factor timeline to SFDC test

### How it works

This workflow runs on a schedule, tracks the last successful run time, and retrieves recently qualified Salesforce leads. It processes leads one at a time, checks whether each lead has an email address, enriches valid-email leads through the Factors.ai account API, and writes the appropriate result back to Salesforce. After all leads are processed successfully, it commits the new lastRunTime so the next scheduled run only picks up new changes.

### Setup steps

- Configure the Schedule Trigger with the desired polling frequency.
- Connect Salesforce credentials and verify the lead query in “Get SF Leads MQL” plus the update mappings in all Salesforce update nodes.
- Configure the Factors.ai API endpoint, authentication, and account parameters in the HTTP Request node.
- Review the static-data logic in “Init Run” and “Finalize Run” to ensure lastRunTime is stored and advanced correctly for your environment.

### Customization

You can adjust the Salesforce MQL lead criteria, the wait durations used for API/Salesforce rate limiting, and the Salesforce fields updated for no-email, no-Factors-email, and successful enrichment outcomes.

## Schedule and fetch leads

Starts the workflow on a schedule, initializes the run window from stored state, and retrieves eligible MQL leads from Salesforce.

## Batch and email gate

Controls item-by-item processing, routes completed runs to finalization, and checks each lead for whether it has an email address before enrichment.

## Email availability handling

Handles the two nearby email-availability outcomes: extracts the email domain for leads with an email, or marks leads without an email back in Salesforce.

## Call Factors API

Waits before the external request, calls the Factors.ai account endpoint using the extracted domain, and runs custom JavaScript to normalize or prepare the API response.

## Evaluate Factors email

Inspects the processed Factors.ai response and branches based on whether a matching email was found for the lead/account.

## Update Salesforce outcomes

Applies the final Salesforce updates for the Factors lookup result, including rate-limiting before a successful lead update and a separate update path when no Factors email is found.
